changes: Run live optimizer defect tests in batches for all 14 synthetic defect cases.
Add docs/test_report/01_defect_hivm_cost_model_test_report_CN.md with detailed live-run defect HIVM cost-model validation report.
Add docs/core/06_extended_defect_cost_model_validation_CN.md with cost-model direction validation results for the new defect cases.
Add 5 extended synthetic defect HIVM/NPUIR cases (J/K/L/M/O) and extend defect regression from 9 to 14 cases.
Remove local .omc scratch directories from release packages and ignore them in Git.
Extend .gitattributes LF rules to vTriton/BiShengIR-adjacent source and fixture file types.
Exclude vTriton snapshots from default pytest collection via pytest.ini.
Make scripts/run_pre_linux_ci.sh support --run while retaining default checklist mode.
Add scripts/run_multibuffer_ci.sh as an explicit MultiBuffer restricted rewrite gate.
Synchronize README/docs displayed version with VERSION file.
Add scripts/run_phase5b_roundtrip_ci.sh and split Phase-5B from backend_fake_ci for more stable Windows/WSL pre-Linux handoff.
Add .gitattributes to enforce LF for source/shell/doc/MLIR files and CRLF for Windows command files.
Normalize CRLF line endings in strategy_search/hivm_ops_editor.py, strategy_search/hivm_parser.py, and strategy_search/hivm_backend.py.
Normalize release-package source/script/doc/MLIR text files to LF for Linux handoff hygiene.
Fix scripts/run_v531_fast_ci.sh comments to match the actual fast CI test subset.
Rewrite README.md for the latest backend-contract-ready pre-Linux state.
Rewrite docs/00_DOCUMENTATION_INDEX_CN.md with updated reading order and terminology.
Rewrite docs/core/33_technical_report_optimization_CN.md for the current search/cost-model/boundary/handoff design.
Rewrite docs/core/34_technical_report_rewrite_CN.md for restricted rewrite, backend contract, fake backend, and real-backend boundaries.
Add docs/core/38_pre_linux_completion_and_handoff_CN.md as the Linux handoff checklist.
Add scripts/run_backend_fake_ci.sh for backend contract / fake backend acceptance tests.
Add scripts/run_pre_linux_ci.sh as a checklist launcher and scripts/run_phase6_positive_ci.sh for Phase-6 positive-case tests.
Add scripts/clean_release_package.sh for cache/debug-file cleanup before packaging.
Clarify backend contract docs: fake backend success is not production rewrite proof.
Remove root-level temporary debug scripts and Python cache files from the release package.
validated_commands: RUN_DEFECT_LIVE=1 PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest -q -m slow tests/test_defect_injection_cases.py -k 'defect_A_small_tile_f32_barrier or defect_B_large_tile_ub_overflow or defect_C_barrier_heavy_sync_stall or defect_D_no_overlap_good_tile'

RUN_DEFECT_LIVE=1 PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest -q -m slow tests/test_defect_injection_cases.py -k 'defect_E_small_tile_many_sync_f32_redundantQ or defect_F_large_tile_overflow_sync_pressure or defect_G_existing_pingpong_but_bad_sync_dtype'

RUN_DEFECT_LIVE=1 PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest -q -m slow tests/test_defect_injection_cases.py -k 'defect_H_event_sync_but_small_tile_no_overlap or defect_I_medium_tile_memory_pressure_vector_heavy or defect_J_tiny_tile_nested_barrier_f32 or defect_K_oversized_m128n192_f32_overflow'

RUN_DEFECT_LIVE=1 PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 python -m pytest -q -m slow tests/test_defect_injection_cases.py -k 'defect_L_good_tile_event_mismatch_vector_heavy or defect_M_tail_unfriendly_n176_no_overlap or defect_O_pingpong_but_many_barriers_extra_buffers'

No real MLIR verifier validation has been run in this environment.
No real HivmOpsEditor operation-level roundtrip has been run in this environment.
No real vTriton DES/trace validation has been run in this environment.
No CANN/msprof/Ascend hardware profile has been run in this environment.
Fake backend CI proves only CLI/contract/report plumbing, not production rewrite legality.

defect_regression.live_search_batched_result: 14 live defect cases passed in four batches
